ingestion_policy.reason: Avoid duplicated chunks and distorted retrieval ranking.

methods.name: Retrieval practice
methods.purpose: Retrieve previously studied information without consulting the answer first.
protocol: Recall, explain, or solve from memory.
Check the answer and record errors.
Correct errors with feedback and retry later.
limitations: Requires feedback to avoid reinforcing errors.

methods.name: Distributed practice
methods.purpose: Distribute study and retrieval across multiple occasions.
protocol: Split a topic across days or weeks.

methods.name: Interleaved practice
methods.purpose: Mix related problem types so the learner must choose the correct strategy.
protocol: Alternate them in a mixed set.
Do not label the method in advance.
limitations: Use only after basic competence exists.

methods.name: Worked examples
methods.purpose: Study a complete correct solution before independent practice.
protocol: Solve a similar problem with partial guidance.

methods.name: Self-explanation
methods.purpose: Explain meaning, reasons, and links to prior knowledge.
protocol: Pause after a step or paragraph.
Explain it in your own words.

methods.name: Pomodoro / focus-break cycles
methods.purpose: Support task initiation, attention, and fatigue management.
protocol: Use a longer break after several cycles.
limitations: Pomodoro does not replace a cognitive learning strategy.

adaptation_guardrails: Do not identify a preferred method after one activity.
Require at least three comparable observations per method and task type.
Keep subjective preference separate from objective performance.
Do not infer fixed learning styles.
